onboarding.welcome_desc: An AI-powered companion diary focused on soul depth and memory autonomy.
onboarding.philosophy_desc: BaiShou is more than a diary; it's an extension of your inner consciousness. Keeping every moment alive through AI-assisted compression.
onboarding.compression_desc: We believe memory's weight lies in depth, not redundancy. Cascade compression distills daily entries into life's highlights.
onboarding.ai_setup_desc: BaiShou itself does not store your AI keys. Configure standard OpenAI compatible protocols to start your soul dialogue.
onboarding.api_guide_desc: BaiShou doesn't store your keys. Please go to "Settings > Provider Management" to configure OpenAI or Gemini protocols.
onboarding.privacy_desc: Your data is stored only locally. With end-to-end sync, you maintain complete control over your memory sovereignty.
onboarding.storage_desc: BaiShou stores data in the system Documents by default. You can specify a custom folder (e.g., USB drive or sync drive) to keep your memories mobile.
onboarding.storage_permission_error: Cannot access selected directory, please ensure read/write permissions.
onboarding.welcome_sub: Setting up your personal workspace and initializing index configuration.
onboarding.ai_config_desc: BaiShou supports multiple AI service providers. Please configure your API Key in settings to enable the AI companion feature.
onboarding.ai_config_steps: After completing the guide, please go to: Settings → AI Service Configuration to add your API Key. Supports OpenAI, Claude, Gemini and other services.
onboarding.import_desc: If you have previous backup data, you can import it through the "Data Management" feature in settings after completing the guide.
onboarding.import_steps: After completing the guide, please go to: Settings → Data Management → Import Backup, select your ZIP backup file to restore data.

settings.tooltip_summary_model: This model is used to generate weekly, monthly, quarterly summaries and annuals. Choosing a higher-performing model is recommended for better output quality.
settings.tooltip_chat_model: This model is used for daily chat interactions.
settings.tooltip_naming_model: Assign a lightweight model to automatically generate titles for your conversations, saving main model compute resources.
settings.tooltip_embedding_model: This model is utilized when storing vectors into RAG memory. When a diary changes, AI uses this model to generate vector indices, enabling semantic search index logic.
settings.tooltip_rag_management: A local RAG (Retrieval-Augmented Generation) knowledge base that enables AI to retrieve past diary contexts, auto-updating with diary changes for semantic memory recall.

data_sync.title: Data Sync
data_sync.backup_tooltip: Pack all diaries and settings as a full backup to local storage or cloud services (S3/WebDAV) for anti-loss and full recovery.
data_sync.snapshot_tooltip: Complete local data snapshots automatically generated by the system before major changes (like restoring a backup) for easy rollbacks.
data_sync.incremental_sync_tooltip: File sync uses a two-way incremental sync mechanism. It automatically compares modification times and hash values between local and cloud files, transfers only changed files, and propagates deletions in both directions. The sync scope covers core data including your diaries, historical summaries, and AI chat partners.
data_sync.desc: Sync your memories to cloud (S3 or WebDAV) for multi-device backup.
data_sync.target_local_desc: Stored only on this device, no cloud sync

data_sync.snapshots_scope_hint: Local snapshots are automatically generated before major changes like restoring backups to facilitate data rollback.

summary.shared_memory_tooltip: Aggregates and filters diaries and summaries by year, quarter, month, and week based on the selected lookback range (months), generating a clean context for AI retrieval.
summary.algorithm_desc: Based on the BaiShou cascade folding algorithm, redundent data is automatically filtered to build our collective memory context.
summary.copy_prefix_hint: Automatically added to the front of copied content (e.g., Hi, these are my memories...)
summary.cascade_folding_content:
To provide the AI with the most efficient memory context, BaiShou uses a 'Cascade Folding' algorithm:

1. Overlap Mechanism: If a Monthly or Quarterly report has been generated for a period, the system assumes the AI already understands the macro-context of that time, so it folds (hides) original diary entries from that period in the shared memory.
2. Progressive Detail: The system prioritizes keeping detailed diaries from the most recent weeks, while older memories are presented through higher-dimensional forms like Weekly, Monthly, or Quarterly reports.
3. Distillation vs Redundancy: This ensures that within limited Token constraints, the AI can see both recent details and the big picture without getting bogged down in an overwhelming sea of raw diary entries.

summary.no_data_range: No diary data found in this range

privacy.title: Privacy & Philosophy
privacy.data_ownership_desc: BaiShou believes memory is a soul extension. Your data is stored locally. Unauthorized uploads never occur beyond your chosen AI/Sync providers.
privacy.local_first_desc: Write diaries offline seamlessly. AI summaries are generated on-demand; we don't store your generated texts.
privacy.transparency_desc: Supports end-to-end data export. Take your memories with you anytime via ZIP or sync to your own S3/WebDAV space.

tools.param_rag_chunks_per_source_desc: Maximum number of chunks extracted from a single website, preventing a long article from dominating the results
tools.param_plain_snippet_length_desc: When an Embedding model is not configured, the system falls back to concatenating the raw text. To avoid consuming too many Tokens, text will be truncated per site after this length
tools.param_tavily_api_key_desc: Tavily search API key (get free at https://app.tavily.com)

shortcuts.translate_content: Please translate the following text into English faithfully and elegantly (including explanations of professional terms):
shortcuts.summarize_content: Please summarize the core meaning behind the following content:

tools.web_search_desc:
Search the internet for current information, news, and real-time data. Use this when the user asks about recent events, current facts, or anything that requires up-to-date information beyond your training data.

IMPORTANT: This tool searches the PUBLIC INTERNET only. Do NOT use this to search the user's personal diary entries — use diary_search for that.

You should provide 2-3 search queries with different angles/keywords to get comprehensive results. For example, if the user asks about "iPhone 16 vs Samsung S25", you could search ["iPhone 16 specs review", "Samsung S25 specs review", "iPhone 16 vs Samsung S25 comparison"].

Results include clickable [title](url) citations — use the url_read tool to read specific pages in detail.
tools.vector_search_desc: Semantic search over conversation history and stored memories. When the user asks about past content, previous decisions, personal preferences, or anything discussed before, you MUST call this tool first. Returns the most semantically relevant conversation snippets with scores.
tools.url_read_desc: Read the text content of a specific webpage URL directly. Use this when you have a specific link you want to analyze or summarize, instead of searching the whole web.
tools.summary_read_desc: Read AI-generated summaries (weekly, monthly, quarterly, or yearly). Returns the summary content for a specific time period. Use diary_list or diary_search for raw diary entries instead.
tools.message_search_desc: Search past conversation messages across all sessions by keyword. Returns matching message snippets with session title and date. Useful when the user references something discussed before, or when you need to recall previous conversations.
tools.memory_store_desc: Store important information as long-term memory for later semantic search retrieval. Use this tool when the user expresses preferences, makes decisions, or when you encounter information worth remembering. Stored memories are vectorized and can be retrieved via the vector_search tool.
tools.memory_delete_desc: Delete stored memories by semantic search. First searches for memories matching the query, then deletes the matching entries. Use this when the user wants to forget something or remove outdated information. IMPORTANT: Always confirm with the user before deleting memories.
tools.diary_write_desc: Create a new diary entry for a given date. If a diary entry already exists for that date, use diary_edit instead.
tools.diary_search_desc:
Search the user's PERSONAL DIARY/JOURNAL entries by keyword. Returns matching diary dates and content snippets. Use this when the user asks about their own past experiences, memories, or personal records.

IMPORTANT: This tool ONLY searches the user's personal diary entries stored locally, NOT the internet. To search the internet, use the web_search tool instead.
tools.diary_read_desc: Read the full content of one or more diary entries by their exact dates. Supports reading up to 20 entries at once. Use diary_list or diary_search first if you do not know the exact date.
tools.diary_list_desc: List all diary entries within a date range (inclusive). Returns a list of dates that have diary entries, along with a brief preview of each entry. Use this to discover which days the user has written diaries.
tools.diary_edit_desc: Modify an existing diary entry. Default mode is "append", which adds new content with a timestamp header (##### HH:mm). Use "overwrite" mode to replace the entire content. Tags are automatically merged with existing ones.
tools.diary_delete_desc: Delete a specific diary entry. This is a destructive action and cannot be undone. Always double check before using.
tools.current_time_desc: Get the current real-world time, date, and day of the week. Very useful for answering questions related to time calculations, age, absolute dates, etc.

chat.empty_hint: Try asking: 'What diaries did I write this week?'

chat.err_server: Server temporarily unavailable, please try again later
chat.err_timeout: Request timeout, please check network and retry
chat.err_network: Could not connect to server, please check network settings
chat.err_no_model: Please configure an AI model in Settings first
chat.cost_disclaimer: Costs are for reference only, subject to official rates.
chat.pricing_source_tooltip: Click to view raw API pricing data in external browser
chat.pricing_refresh_network_error: Network error, please check your connection
chat.pricing_boot_load_failed: Could not fetch the models.dev pricing table. Cost estimates may be inaccurate — check your network and refresh in the billing panel.
chat.delete_confirm_multi: Delete $count conversations? This cannot be undone.
chat.delete_msg_confirm: Are you sure you want to delete this message history? This action is irreversible.
chat.tts_not_configured: TTS model not configured, please configure a TTS model in settings

sessions.companion_desc: Start chatting directly without managing sessions
sessions.companion_on: Enabled — Single continuous chat, no session concept
sessions.memory_window_desc: Send recent {count} messages to the model
sessions.persona_hint: Describe the Partner's identity and style
sessions.behavior_hint: Describe rules the Partner must follow

rag.title: RAG Memory Manager
rag.clear_all_content: Are you sure you want to delete all embedded vector data? This action cannot be undone.
rag.rag_disabled_hint: Global memory is disabled, Partner will not use RAG retrieval
rag.detect_failed: Detection failed, please check model config
rag.clear_dim_content:
Delete all ${dimension}-D vector data?
Other dimensions will not be affected.
rag.batch_embed_content:
This will read all diary entries and generate vector embeddings.
Existing entries will not be re-embedded.
This may take some time.
rag.memories_auto_hint: Memories will be stored here automatically after chatting with Agent
rag.migration_pending_content:
The previous embedding migration was not completed (possibly due to app crash).

Continue migration? Backup data is still safe.
rag.migration_mismatch_content:
The memory in the current workspace uses a different embedding model.
This will cause old memories to be completely hidden from AI searches due to vector dimension mismatch.

Do you want to migrate and unify them to the latest global model? (If you click [Later], you can still do this manually in the RAG page anytime.)
rag.migration_model_changed_content:
Embedding model change detected.

Old vector data is incompatible with the new model dimensions, all data needs to be re-embedded.

This will:
• Backup existing text metadata
• Clear old vectors and re-embed with new model
• Auto-verify data integrity after completion

Process runs asynchronously in the background.
rag.migration_switch_warning_content: The new model may be incompatible with existing vectors. Diary embeddings will be rebuilt in the background. Continue?

assistant.prompt_hint: Define the companion's role, behavior and response style...
assistant.context_window_desc: How many recent conversation turns are sent to the model. One turn starts with your message and includes the assistant reply and any tool calls in that turn. More turns mean longer memory but higher token usage.
assistant.set_default_desc: Automatically use this companion for new conversations
assistant.empty_hint: Your matrix is empty. No mind cores deployed yet.
assistant.delete_confirm_content: Are you sure you want to permanently obliterate this agent's data? It cannot be undone.
assistant.avatar_hint: Click to change icon or avatar
assistant.context_unlimited_desc: No turn limit—all conversation history (each turn includes your message, the reply, and tool calls) is sent to the model.
assistant.bind_model_desc: Once bound, new conversations with this partner will prioritize the selected model
assistant.compress_disabled_desc: Conversations will not be auto-compressed, all messages are retained
assistant.compress_enabled_desc: Old messages are compressed to summaries when threshold is exceeded
assistant.compress_tooltip: When conversation context exceeds the set Token threshold, the system will automatically compress early conversation content, keeping recent conversation rounds.
assistant.compress_keep_turns_desc: When compression triggers, the most recent turns are kept in full. One turn starts with your message and includes the assistant reply and any tool calls in that turn; older turns are summarized.
assistant.compress_keep_turns_tooltip: When compression triggers, the specified number of recent turns are kept as full text (your message, the reply, and tool calls in each turn) so context stays coherent.
assistant.keep_one_error: Must keep at least one companion
assistant.delete_confirm_desc: This will permanently delete all configurations for this assistant. This action cannot be reversed.
assistant.title: Partner Management
assistant.picker_no_selection: Select a companion to view details

recall.title: Context Recovery
recall.no_results: No history match found in the vault.

error.api_key: API Key expired or invalid. Please update your key in model settings.
error.rate_limit: Too many requests or rate limit exceeded. Please try again later.
error.network: Network connection failed. Please check your connection or proxy settings.
error.timeout: Request timed out. Please try again.
error.quota: Insufficient account quota or balance reported by the provider.
error.create_session: Failed to create session due to system error: {{msg}}
error.vision_not_supported: The current model does not support image recognition/vision capabilities. Please switch model and try again.

agent.default_assistant_prompt: You are a friendly and creative AI assistant.
agent.delete_session_confirm: Are you sure you want to permanently delete this session? This cannot be undone.
agent.batch_delete_confirm: Are you sure you want to delete the selected {{count}} sessions? This cannot be undone.

sidebar.no_recent_chats: No recent chats. Start one now!

input.model_no_vision_hint: Current model does not support images. Please switch to a multimodal model

shortcut.no_match: 找不到任何匹配的快捷指令...

tts.voice_hint: Enter the specific voice / speaker ID supported by your current TTS model. E.g. alloy for OpenAI, 冰糖 or Mia for Xiaomi MiMo TTS.

models.routing_desc: Assign specialized models for different daily tasks.

dashboard.greeting: 又见面了，今天过得怎样？
dashboard.shared_memory_desc: Adjust the lookback months to export recent summary context for RAG or LLMs.

assistant.matrix_desc: 用来精细化管理和创造专属助理对象，包含预设提示词配置与单独工作空间关联。
assistant.picker_no_selection: Select a companion to view details

gallery.empty_desc: No records yet. Add more photos in chats or diary entries!

hotkey.enable_global_desc: Toggle the console overlay from anywhere
hotkey.warning: Warning: May conflict with system keys

profile.avatar_file_missing: Avatar file not found, restored to default avatar

recall.title: 上下文补充与唤醒
recall.search_hint: 检索关键字或记忆片段...
recall.no_results: 未在库中匹配到任何历史记忆碎片。
recall.inject: 提取至当前上下文对话

home.desc: 仪表盘暂未施工完成，可切换前往日记页查看以往记录。

emoji.no_native_support: Your browser does not support color emoji
emoji.keyboard_hint: When there are search results, use keyboard to select.
emoji.upload_avatar_hint: Upload an image from your device as avatar

version_control.git_status_tooltip: Git is used for local data version control. It tracks change history, backups to remote Git repositories (like GitHub/Gitee), and syncs across devices. If you mistakenly restore a wrong version during file sync or backup operations, you can rollback or discard changes via version control to prevent data loss. Note: This feature is only available on desktop; mobile is not supported due to performance and platform constraints.
version_control.commit_placeholder: Enter commit message (timestamp used if empty)

settings.title: TTS Voice Synthesis Settings
settings.mimo_base_url_placeholder: Leave empty for default service, or enter a custom service URL
settings.api_key_optional_hint: Leave empty if your gateway does not require authentication. When a key is set, fetch models and test playback will send it.
settings.api_key_tooltip: Leave empty if your gateway does not require authentication. When a key is set, fetch models and test playback will send it.
settings.page_tooltip: Configure the global TTS provider, model, and voice. For OpenAI-compatible gateways you can use Base URL only—leave API Key empty to fetch models and preview when no auth is required.
settings.voice_hint: Enter the voice / speaker ID supported by the current model
settings.prompt_text_placeholder: Required: spoken text in the reference audio
settings.test_placeholder: Enter text to test speech synthesis
